#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("src/google/adk/agents/config_schemas/AgentConfig.json")
text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
path.write_text(
    text.replace('"title": "AgentRefConfig"', '"title": "AgentReferenceConfig"', 1),
    encoding="utf-8",
)
PY

from pathlib import Path

# Path to the generated schema that should never be edited directly.
AGENT_CONFIG_JSON = Path("src/google/adk/agents/config_schemas/AgentConfig.json")


# Placeholder fixture: ensures the generated schema is mentioned in tests
# so that accidental edits surface during code review.
def test_agentconfig_schema_exists():
    """Assert that the generated AgentConfig.json schema file is present."""
    assert AGENT_CONFIG_JSON.exists(), (
        f"AgentConfig.json not found at {AGENT_CONFIG_JSON}. "
        "Run the schema regeneration script to restore it."
    )


__all__ = ["AGENT_CONFIG_JSON"]
